steps.title: State a scientific fact
steps.content: The sentence describes a stable fact about xenon: a xenon atom contains 54 protons. The singular subject a xenon atom needs a singular present-tense verb.

steps.title: Choose simple present tense
steps.content: Choice A uses past tense, which does not fit a permanent fact. Choice B uses present perfect, which suggests a completed action rather than a property. Choice D uses present progressive, which suggests a temporary action. The remaining verb correctly states an ongoing scientific fact. The answer is C.
